---
title: "ISS"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-27"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

```


```{r library,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}

.libPaths("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Rloading/4.4/")
library(purrr); library(stringr)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(harmony)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggpubr)
library(glmGamPoi)
library(ggh4x)

axis.UMAP <- ggh4x::guide_axis_truncated(
  trunc_lower = unit(0, "npc"),
  trunc_upper = unit(1.5, "cm"))

.libPaths("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Rloading/4.4.Spatial/")
library(Seurat)

```




```{r loading,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}

path <- "../Data/ISS"
coords_list <- list()

# get only subdirectories, not the parent path itself
dirs <- list.dirs(path, full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE)

# we'll store all matrices here, named by sample
sc_list <- list()

for (d in dirs) {
  sample_name <- basename(d)  # e.g. "PCW7.Heart"
  message("Processing: ", sample_name)

  file_path <- file.path(d, "GeneCoord.csv")
  if (!file.exists(file_path)) {
    warning("Skipping ", sample_name, ": no GeneCoord.csv")
    next
  }

  # 1. read CSV (comma-separated)
  df <- read.csv(file_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  # make sure coords are numeric (robust to weird CSV parsing)
  df$x_location <- as.numeric(df$x_location)
  df$y_location <- as.numeric(df$y_location)
  cell_xy_ref <- df %>%
    group_by(cell) %>%
    summarise(
      centroid_x = mean(x_location, na.rm = TRUE),
      centroid_y = mean(y_location, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    select(cell, centroid_x, centroid_y)
  cell_xy_ref$sample_name <- sample_name
  cell_xy_ref$cell_ids <- cell_xy_ref$cell
  coords_list[[sample_name]] <- cell_xy_ref
  
  # 2. collapse to counts per gene per cell
  wide_df <- df %>%
    group_by(feature_name, cell) %>%
    summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = cell,
      values_from = count,
      values_fill = 0
    )
  
  # 3. make rownames = gene, drop the feature_name column
  wide_df <- as.data.frame(wide_df)
  rownames(wide_df) <- wide_df$feature_name
  wide_df$feature_name <- NULL

  colnames(wide_df) <- paste(colnames(wide_df),sample_name,sep = "_")


  # 4. convert to matrix
  wide_df <- as.matrix(wide_df)
  sc <- CreateSeuratObject(wide_df,project = sample_name,assay = "ISS")
  sc$orig.ident <- sample_name

  # 5. store in the list
  sc_list[[sample_name]] <- sc
  print(sample_name)
}

saveRDS(sc_list,"../Rsave/ISS_scObject.Rds")

coords <-as.data.frame(dplyr::bind_rows(coords_list))
rownames(coords) <- paste(coords$cell_ids,coords$sample_name,sep = "_")

saveRDS(coords,"./Coordinates.Rds")


```


```{r scObject,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}
scObject <- readRDS("../Rsave/ISS_scObject.Rds")

options(future.globals.maxSize = 64000 * 1024^2)


pic <- list()
for (n in 1:length(scObject)) {
 pic[[n]] <- VlnPlot(scObject[[n]], features = c("nFeature_ISS","nCount_ISS"),
              group.by = "orig.ident", pt.size = 0) &
    ylab("Heart") &
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 5), limits = c(0, 100), expand = expansion(mult = 0))&ylab(unique(scObject[[n]]$orig.ident))
}

pdf("../Results/ISS/VLN.pdf",width = 15,height = 12)
wrap_plots(pic,ncol = 4)
dev.off()



maxfeature <- c(45,50,15,50,55,40,50)
minfeature <- c(5,7,7,7,7,5,7)

for (n in 1:length(scObject)) {
scObject[[n]] <- subset(scObject[[n]],nFeature_ISS > minfeature[n] & nFeature_ISS < maxfeature[n])
scObject[[n]] <- SCTransform(
    scObject[[n]],
    assay = DefaultAssay(scObject[[n]]),     # usually "ISS" or "RNA"
    method = "glmGamPoi",
    variable.features.n = Inf,               # small panel: keep all genes
    verbose = FALSE
  )
}

# for (n in 1:length(scObject)) {
#   scObject[[n]] <- NormalizeData(scObject[[n]])
# }



pic <- list()
for (n in 1:length(scObject)) {
 pic[[n]] <- VlnPlot(scObject[[n]], features = c("nFeature_ISS","nCount_ISS"),
              group.by = "orig.ident", pt.size = 0) &
    ylab("Heart") &
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 5), limits = c(0, 100), expand = expansion(mult = 0))&ylab(unique(scObject[[n]]$orig.ident))
}

pdf("../Results/ISS/VLN_filtered.pdf",width = 15,height = 12)
wrap_plots(pic,ncol = 4)
dev.off()


scObject.Brain <- Reduce(merge,scObject[c(1,6)])
scObject.Heart <- Reduce(merge,scObject[c(2,4,5,7)])




scObject.Brain$Age.PCW <- gsub("_.*","",scObject.Brain$orig.ident)
scObject.Brain$Organ <- gsub(".*_","",scObject.Brain$orig.ident)
scObject.Heart$Age.PCW <- gsub("_.*","",scObject.Heart$orig.ident)
scObject.Heart$Organ <- gsub(".*_","",scObject.Heart$orig.ident)


# choose features for PCA — with small ISS panels, just use all genes present
VariableFeatures(scObject.Brain) <- rownames(scObject.Brain)
VariableFeatures(scObject.Heart) <- rownames(scObject.Heart)

# PCA on SCT residuals (no ScaleData needed for SCT)
scObject.Brain <- RunPCA(scObject.Brain, assay = "SCT",
                 features = VariableFeatures(scObject.Brain),
                 npcs = 20, verbose = FALSE)
# PCA on SCT residuals (no ScaleData needed for SCT)
scObject.Heart <- RunPCA(scObject.Heart, assay = "SCT",
                 features = VariableFeatures(scObject.Heart),
                 npcs = 20, verbose = FALSE)




scObject.Brain <- RunHarmony(scObject.Brain,
  group.by.vars="Age.PCW",
  reduction.use = "pca",
  dims.use = 1:20,
  verbose = TRUE,
  reduction.save = "harmony",
  project.dim = TRUE,max_iter = 10)


scObject.Heart <- RunHarmony(scObject.Heart,
  group.by.vars="Age.PCW",
  reduction.use = "pca",
  dims.use = 1:20,
  verbose = TRUE,
  reduction.save = "harmony",
  project.dim = TRUE,max_iter = 10)


scObject.Brain <- RunUMAP(scObject.Brain,1:20,reduction ="harmony",reduction.name = "umap_harmomy")
scObject.Heart <- RunUMAP(scObject.Heart,1:20,reduction ="harmony",reduction.name = "umap_harmomy")


save(scObject.Brain,scObject.Heart,file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.Rdata")

```


```{r scObject,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}

scRNA <- readRDS("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Rsave/OMIX008302-02.rds")
Metadata_ENatlas_all <- read.delim("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Rsave/Metadata_ENatlas_all.txt")
scRNA@meta.data <- Metadata_ENatlas_all[match(rownames(Metadata_ENatlas_all),rownames(scRNA@meta.data)),]

scRNA <- SplitObject(scRNA,split.by = "Organ")


options(future.globals.maxSize = 64000 * 1024^2)

gc()

# SCTransform each organ reference
for (k in names(scRNA)) {
  scRNA[[k]] <- SCTransform(scRNA[[k]], method = "glmGamPoi",
                           variable.features.n = 3000,  # for scRNA you can keep HVGs
                           verbose = FALSE)
  scRNA[[k]] <- RunPCA(scRNA[[k]], assay = "SCT", npcs = 30, verbose = FALSE)
  # UMAP is optional but useful for projection later:
  scRNA[[k]] <- RunUMAP(scRNA[[k]], reduction = "pca", dims = 1:30,
                       return.model = TRUE, reduction.name = "umap_ref")
}

saveRDS(scRNA,"/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Rsave/OMIX008302-02_SCT.rds")


```


```{r scObject,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}

load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.Rdata")
scRNA <-  readRDS("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Rsave/OMIX008302-02_SCT.rds")

"%Nin%" <- Negate("%in%")
scRNA$Brain <- subset(scRNA$Brain, newL3_Cell_type %Nin% c("Debri","Doublet","SinusVenosus_related"))
scRNA$Heart <- subset(scRNA$Heart, newL3_Cell_type %Nin% c("Debri","Doublet"))



common_genes <- list(
  Brain = intersect(rownames(scRNA$Brain), rownames(scObject.Brain)),
  Heart = intersect(rownames(scRNA$Heart), rownames(scObject.Heart))
)
sapply(common_genes, length)  # sanity: should be close to your panel size

options(future.globals.maxSize = 64000 * 1024^2)

# 1) Find anchors (SCT→SCT). Use only common genes.
anchors_brain <- FindTransferAnchors(
  reference = scRNA$Brain,
  query     = scObject.Brain,
  normalization.method = "SCT",
  reference.reduction  = "pca",
  dims      = 1:30, 
  features = common_genes$Brain
)

# 2) Transfer labels
pred_brain <- TransferData(
  anchorset = anchors_brain,
  refdata   = scRNA$Brain$newL3_Cell_type,   # <-- replace with your column in scRNA meta
  dims      = 1:30
)

scObject.Brain <- AddMetaData(scObject.Brain, pred_brain)

save(scObject.Brain,scObject.Heart,file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain_LABEL.transfered.Rdata")

######################


# 1) Find anchors (SCT→SCT). Use only common genes.
anchors_heart <- FindTransferAnchors(
  reference = scRNA$Heart,
  query     = scObject.Heart,
  normalization.method = "SCT",
  reference.reduction  = "pca",
  dims      = 1:30,
  features = common_genes$Heart
)

# 2) Transfer labels
pred_heart <- TransferData(
  anchorset = anchors_heart,
  refdata   = scRNA$Heart$newL3_Cell_type,   # <-- replace with your column in scRNA meta
  dims      = 1:30
)

scObject.Heart <- AddMetaData(scObject.Heart, pred_heart)


save(scObject.Brain,scObject.Heart,file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain_LABEL.transfered.Rdata")


# DimPlot(scObject.Brain,group.by = "predicted.id",reduction = "umap_harmomy" )
# DimPlot(scObject.Heart,group.by = "predicted.id" ,reduction = "umap_harmomy")
# 
# 
# FeaturePlot(scObject.Brain,features = "prediction.score.NPCs")
# FeaturePlot(scObject.Heart,features = "prediction.score.NPCs")

```



```{r loading,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}
load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.Rdata")



scObject.Brain.down <- SketchData(
  object = scObject.Brain,
  ncells = 600000,            # choose e.g. 50k–150k depending on size
  method = "LeverageScore",   # good default
  sketched.assay = "sketch",
)

scObject.Heart.down <- SketchData(
  object = scObject.Heart,
  ncells = 500000,            # choose e.g. 50k–150k depending on size
  method = "LeverageScore",   # good default
  sketched.assay = "sketch",
)

rm(scObject.Brain,scObject.Heart)
gc()
# load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2.Rdata")


options(future.globals.maxSize = 64000 * 1024^2)

# Cosine tends to work better than Euclidean for short gene panels
scObject.Brain.down <- FindNeighbors(
  scObject.Brain.down,
  reduction    = "harmony",
  dims         = 1:20,            # 10–20; pick via ElbowPlot
  k.param      = 50,              # neighborhood size
  nn.method    = "annoy",
  annoy.metric = "cosine",        # << key change
  graph.name   = c("Sketch_snn","Sketch_knn")  # avoid name clashes
)

scObject.Heart.down <- FindNeighbors(
  scObject.Heart.down,
  reduction    = "harmony",
  dims         = 1:20,
  k.param      = 50,
  nn.method    = "annoy",
  annoy.metric = "cosine",
  graph.name   = c("Sketch_snn","Sketch_knn")
)


coords <- readRDS("./Coordinates.Rds")

scObject.Brain.down@meta.data[9:10] <- coords[match(rownames(scObject.Brain.down@meta.data),rownames(coords)),][2:3]
scObject.Heart.down@meta.data[9:10] <- coords[match(rownames(scObject.Heart.down@meta.data),rownames(coords)),][2:3]

save(scObject.Brain.down,scObject.Heart.down,file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_sketch.Rdata")


scObject.Brain.down <- FindClusters(scObject.Brain.down,resolution = c(0.3,0.5,0.8,1),algorithm=2,graph.name ="Sketch_knn" )
scObject.Heart.down <- FindClusters(scObject.Heart.down,resolution = c(0.3,0.5,0.8,1),algorithm=2,graph.name ="Sketch_knn")

# save(scObject.Brain.down,scObject.Heart.down,file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.Rdata")
save(scObject.Brain.down,scObject.Heart.down,file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_sketch.Rdata")
```


```{r scObject,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}
library(purrr); library(stringr)

load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_sketch_2.Rdata")
scObject.Brain.down2 <- scObject.Brain.down
scObject.Heart.down2 <- scObject.Heart.down

scObject.Brain.down2$cell <- map2_chr(colnames(scObject.Brain.down2), scObject.Brain.down2$orig.ident, ~ str_remove(.x, fixed(paste0("_", .y))))
scObject.Heart.down2$cell <- map2_chr(colnames(scObject.Heart.down2), scObject.Heart.down2$orig.ident, ~ str_remove(.x, fixed(paste0("_", .y))))

load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_sketch.Rdata")



scObject.Brain.down$cell <- map2_chr(colnames(scObject.Brain.down), scObject.Brain.down$orig.ident, ~ str_remove(.x, fixed(paste0("_", .y))))
scObject.Heart.down$cell <- map2_chr(colnames(scObject.Heart.down), scObject.Heart.down$orig.ident, ~ str_remove(.x, fixed(paste0("_", .y))))


# columns you want to bring from down2
cols_to_add <- colnames(scObject.Brain.down2@meta.data)[c(13,14,15,16,17,23)]
# create the columns in down (all NA by default)
for (cn in cols_to_add) {
  scObject.Brain.down@meta.data[[cn]] <- NA
}
# find overlapping cells (cell names are rownames of meta.data)
common_cells <- intersect(
  rownames(scObject.Brain.down@meta.data),
  rownames(scObject.Brain.down2@meta.data)
)

# fill only those rows; everything else stays NA
scObject.Brain.down@meta.data[common_cells, cols_to_add] <-
  scObject.Brain.down2@meta.data[common_cells, cols_to_add, drop = FALSE]


# columns you want to bring from down2
cols_to_add <- colnames(scObject.Brain.down2@meta.data)[c(13,14,15,16,17,23)]
# create the columns in down (all NA by default)
for (cn in cols_to_add) {
  scObject.Brain.down@meta.data[[cn]] <- NA
}
# find overlapping cells (cell names are rownames of meta.data)
common_cells <- intersect(
  rownames(scObject.Brain.down@meta.data),
  rownames(scObject.Brain.down2@meta.data)
)

# fill only those rows; everything else stays NA
scObject.Brain.down@meta.data[common_cells, cols_to_add] <-
  scObject.Brain.down2@meta.data[common_cells, cols_to_add, drop = FALSE]

# columns you want to bring from down2
cols_to_add <- colnames(scObject.Heart.down2@meta.data)[c(13,14,15,16,17,23)]
# create the columns in down (all NA by default)
for (cn in cols_to_add) {
  scObject.Heart.down@meta.data[[cn]] <- NA
}
# find overlapping cells (cell names are rownames of meta.data)
common_cells <- intersect(
  rownames(scObject.Heart.down@meta.data),
  rownames(scObject.Heart.down2@meta.data)
)

scObject.Heart.down@meta.data[common_cells, cols_to_add] <-
  scObject.Heart.down2@meta.data[common_cells, cols_to_add, drop = FALSE]

save(scObject.Brain.down,scObject.Heart.down,file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_sketch.Rdata")





load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_sketch.Rdata")

scObject.Brain.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Brain.down,split.by = "orig.ident")
scObject.Heart.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Heart.down,split.by = "orig.ident")


PCW10_Brain <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW10_Brain/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW8_Brain <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW8_Brain/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

PCW12_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW12_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW10_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW10_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW8_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW8_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW7_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW7_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

PCW10_Brain <- merge(PCW10_Brain,scObject.Brain.down$PCW10_Brain@meta.data,by="cell")
PCW8_Brain <- merge(PCW8_Brain,scObject.Brain.down$PCW8_Brain@meta.data,by="cell")

PCW7_Heart <- merge(PCW7_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW7_Heart@meta.data,by="cell")
PCW8_Heart <- merge(PCW8_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW8_Heart@meta.data,by="cell")
PCW10_Heart <- merge(PCW10_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW10_Heart@meta.data,by="cell")
PCW12_Heart <- merge(PCW12_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW12_Heart@meta.data,by="cell")

write.csv(PCW10_Brain, "../Results/ISS/PCW10_Brain_ISS.coord_sub_newTEST.csv")
write.csv(PCW8_Brain,  "../Results/ISS/PCW8_Brain_ISS.coord_sub_newTEST.csv")

write.csv(PCW7_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW7_Heart_ISS.coord_sub_newTEST.csv")
write.csv(PCW8_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW8_Heart_ISS.coord_sub_newTEST.csv")
write.csv(PCW10_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW10_Heart_ISS.coord_sub_newTEST.csv")
write.csv(PCW12_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW12_Heart_ISS.coord_sub_newTEST.csv")

load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_sketch.Rdata")
DefaultAssay(scObject.Brain.down) <- "SCT"
DefaultAssay(scObject.Heart.down) <- "SCT"
scObject.Brain.down <- PrepSCTFindMarkers(scObject.Brain.down)
scObject.Heart.down <- PrepSCTFindMarkers(scObject.Heart.down)


scObject.Brain.down$Sketch_knn_res.1 <- factor(scObject.Brain.down$Sketch_knn_res.1,levels = as.character(sort(as.numeric(unique(scObject.Brain.down$Sketch_knn_res.1)))))
scObject.Heart.down$Sketch_knn_res.1 <- factor(scObject.Heart.down$Sketch_knn_res.1,levels = as.character(sort(as.numeric(unique(scObject.Heart.down$Sketch_knn_res.1)))))

scObject.Brain.down$Leiden_res.1 <- factor(scObject.Brain.down$Leiden_res.1,levels = as.character(sort(as.numeric(unique(scObject.Brain.down$Leiden_res.1)))))
scObject.Heart.down$Leiden_res.1 <- factor(scObject.Heart.down$Leiden_res.1,levels = as.character(sort(as.numeric(unique(scObject.Heart.down$Leiden_res.1)))))


BRAIN.DEG <- FindAllMarkers(scObject.Brain.down,group.by = "Sketch_knn_res.1",only.pos = T,logfc.threshold = 0.4)
HEART.DEG <- FindAllMarkers(scObject.Heart.down,group.by = "Sketch_knn_res.1",only.pos = T,logfc.threshold = 0.4)
BRAIN.DEG.leiden <- FindAllMarkers(scObject.Brain.down,group.by = "Leiden_res.1",only.pos = T,logfc.threshold = 0.4)
HEART.DEG.leiden <- FindAllMarkers(scObject.Heart.down,group.by = "Leiden_res.1",only.pos = T,logfc.threshold = 0.4)

BRAIN.DEG[order(-BRAIN.DEG$avg_log2FC, -BRAIN.DEG$p_val_adj),]



brain.louvain.deg.tops <- c()
for (clusters in unique(BRAIN.DEG$cluster)) {
  x <- subset(BRAIN.DEG, cluster == clusters & p_val_adj<0.05)
  x <- x[order(-x$avg_log2FC, -x$p_val_adj),][1:20,]
  brain.louvain.deg.tops <- rbind(brain.louvain.deg.tops,x)
}

heart.louvain.deg.tops <- c()
for (clusters in unique(HEART.DEG$cluster)) {
  x <- subset(HEART.DEG, cluster == clusters & p_val_adj<0.05)
  x <- x[order(-x$avg_log2FC, -x$p_val_adj),][1:20,]
  heart.louvain.deg.tops <- rbind(heart.louvain.deg.tops,x)
}

brain.leiden.deg.tops <- c()
for (clusters in unique(BRAIN.DEG.leiden$cluster)) {
  x <- subset(BRAIN.DEG.leiden, cluster == clusters & p_val_adj<0.05)
  x <- x[order(-x$avg_log2FC, -x$p_val_adj),][1:20,]
  brain.leiden.deg.tops <- rbind(brain.leiden.deg.tops,x)
}

heart.leiden.deg.tops <- c()
for (clusters in unique(HEART.DEG.leiden$cluster)) {
  x <- subset(HEART.DEG.leiden, cluster == clusters & p_val_adj<0.05)
  x <- x[order(-x$avg_log2FC, -x$p_val_adj),][1:20,]
  heart.leiden.deg.tops <- rbind(heart.leiden.deg.tops,x)
}


brain.louvain.deg.tops <- brain.louvain.deg.tops[complete.cases(brain.louvain.deg.tops),]
heart.louvain.deg.tops <- heart.louvain.deg.tops[complete.cases(heart.louvain.deg.tops),]
brain.leiden.deg.tops <- brain.leiden.deg.tops[complete.cases(brain.leiden.deg.tops),]
heart.leiden.deg.tops <- heart.leiden.deg.tops[complete.cases(heart.leiden.deg.tops),]

write.csv(brain.louvain.deg.tops,"/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/BRAIN.DEG.Louvain.csv")
write.csv(heart.louvain.deg.tops,"/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/HEART.DEG.Louvain.csv")
write.csv(brain.leiden.deg.tops,"/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/BRAIN.DEG.leiden.csv")
write.csv(heart.leiden.deg.tops,"/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/HEART.DEG.leiden.csv")




brain.louvain.deg.PLOT <- DotPlot(subset(scObject.Brain.down,subset = !is.na(`Sketch_knn_res.1`)),features = na.omit(unique(brain.louvain.deg.tops$gene)),group.by = "Sketch_knn_res.1")+scale_color_gradient2(low = "grey60",mid = "white",high = "purple3")+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20),title = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20))+rotate_x_text(90)+ggtitle("Brain.Louvain(Sketched)_res.1")

heart.louvain.deg.PLOT <- DotPlot(subset(scObject.Heart.down,subset = !is.na(`Sketch_knn_res.1`)),features = na.omit(unique(heart.louvain.deg.tops$gene)),group.by = "Sketch_knn_res.1")+scale_color_gradient2(low = "grey60",mid = "white",high = "purple3")+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20),title = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20))+rotate_x_text(90)+ggtitle("Heart.Louvain(Sketched)_res.1")


brain.leiden.deg.PLOT <- DotPlot(scObject.Brain.down,features = na.omit(unique(brain.leiden.deg.tops$gene)),group.by = "Leiden_res.1")+scale_color_gradient2(low = "grey60",mid = "white",high = "purple3")+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20),title = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20))+rotate_x_text(90)+ggtitle("Brain.Leiden_res.1")

heart.leiden.deg.PLOT <- DotPlot(scObject.Heart.down,features = na.omit(unique(heart.leiden.deg.tops$gene)),group.by = "Leiden_res.1")+scale_color_gradient2(low = "grey60",mid = "white",high = "purple3")+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20),title = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20))+rotate_x_text(90)+ggtitle("Heart.Leiden_res.1")


pdf("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/brain.louvain.deg.PLOT.pdf",width = 35,height = 15)
brain.louvain.deg.PLOT
dev.off()

pdf("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/heart.louvain.deg.PLOT.pdf",width = 35,height = 15)
heart.louvain.deg.PLOT
dev.off()


pdf("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/brain.leiden.deg.PLOT.pdf",width = 35,height = 15)
brain.leiden.deg.PLOT
dev.off()

pdf("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/heart.leiden.deg.PLOT.pdf",width = 35,height = 15)
heart.leiden.deg.PLOT
dev.off()


genes <- list(
  Pan_EC = c("PECAM1", "CDH5", "VWF"),
  Capillary_BBB_like = c("MFSD2A", "SLC7A5", "ABCB1", "APCDD1"),
  Venous = c("FLT1", "EMCN", "NR2F2"),
  Arterial = c("GJA4", "UNC5B", "DLL4", "HEY1"),
  Tip_angiogenic = c("APLN", "ADM", "ANGPT2", "ESM1"),
  Lymphatic = c("PROX1", "LYVE1", "MMRN1"),
  Pericyte = c("PDGFRB", "ABCC9", "KCNJ8"),
  SMC = c("ACTA2", "TAGLN"),
  Fibroblast = c("COL1A1", "DCN", "OGN", "LUM")
)

genes <- unique(unlist(genes))


brain.louvain.deg.PLOT <- DotPlot(subset(scObject.Brain.down,subset = !is.na(`Sketch_knn_res.1`)),features = genes,group.by = "Sketch_knn_res.1")+scale_color_gradient2(low = "grey60",mid = "white",high = "purple3")+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20),title = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20))+rotate_x_text(90)+ggtitle("Brain.Louvain(Sketched)_res.1")

heart.louvain.deg.PLOT <- DotPlot(subset(scObject.Heart.down,subset = !is.na(`Sketch_knn_res.1`)),features = genes,group.by = "Sketch_knn_res.1")+scale_color_gradient2(low = "grey60",mid = "white",high = "purple3")+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20),title = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20))+rotate_x_text(90)+ggtitle("Heart.Louvain(Sketched)_res.1")


brain.leiden.deg.PLOT <- DotPlot(scObject.Brain.down,features = genes,group.by = "Leiden_res.1")+scale_color_gradient2(low = "grey60",mid = "white",high = "purple3")+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20),title = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20))+rotate_x_text(90)+ggtitle("Brain.Leiden_res.1")

heart.leiden.deg.PLOT <- DotPlot(scObject.Heart.down,features = genes,group.by = "Leiden_res.1")+scale_color_gradient2(low = "grey60",mid = "white",high = "purple3")+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20),title = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20))+rotate_x_text(90)+ggtitle("Heart.Leiden_res.1")


pdf("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/brain.louvain.PLOT_markers.pdf",width = 10,height = 15)
brain.louvain.deg.PLOT
dev.off()

pdf("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/heart.louvain.PLOT_markers.pdf",width = 10,height = 15)
heart.louvain.deg.PLOT
dev.off()


pdf("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/brain.leiden.PLOT_markers.pdf",width = 10,height = 15)
brain.leiden.deg.PLOT
dev.off()

pdf("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/heart.leiden.PLOT_markers.pdf",width = 10,height = 15)
heart.leiden.deg.PLOT
dev.off()


p1 <- DimPlot(scObject.Brain.down,group.by = "Leiden_res.1",label = T)+ggtitle("Brain.Leiden_res.1")
p2 <- DimPlot(scObject.Heart.down,group.by = "Leiden_res.1",label = T)+ggtitle("Heart.Leiden_res.1")
p3 <- DimPlot(subset(scObject.Brain.down,subset = !is.na(`Sketch_knn_res.1`)),group.by = "Sketch_knn_res.1",label = T)+ggtitle("Brain.Louvain(Sketched)_res.1")
p4 <- DimPlot(subset(scObject.Heart.down,subset = !is.na(`Sketch_knn_res.1`)),group.by = "Sketch_knn_res.1",label = T)+ggtitle("Heart.Louvain(Sketched)_res.1")


pdf("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/UMAP_LOUVAIN.pdf",width = 25,height = 12)
p3+p4

dev.off()

pdf("/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/elyasmo/Projects/Tiantan/Results/ISS/ClusterPlots/UMAP_LEIDEN.pdf",width = 25,height = 12)
p1+p2
dev.off()



```



```{r scObject,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}

load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_sketch.Rdata")

scObject.Brain.down <- SetIdent(scObject.Brain.down,value = "Leiden_res.1")
scObject.Heart.down <- SetIdent(scObject.Heart.down,value = "Leiden_res.1")

scObject.Brain.down <- RenameIdents(scObject.Brain.down,
                     "1" = "Proliferative",
                     "2" = "ECs_Cpillary",
                     "3" = "Endocardial-like",
                     "4" = "Neurons",
                     "5" = "Proliferative",
                     "6" = "Neural progenitor",
                     "7" = "Neurons",
                     "8" = "Tip cells",
                     "9" = "Meningeal/Mesenchyme",
                     "10" = "Neurons",
                     "11" = "Neurons",
                     "12" = "OPC",
                     "13" = "ECs_Arterial",
                     "14" = "Neurons",
                     "15" = "ECs_Venous",
                     "16" = "SMCs",
                     "17" = "ECs_Lymphatic",
                     "18" = "Neurons",
                     "19" = "ECs_Cpillary",
                     "20" = "Neurons",
                     "21" = "Mesenchyme",
                     "22" = "Mural_Pericytes",
                     "23" = "Proliferative")

scObject.Brain.down$Annotation <- Idents(scObject.Brain.down)

scObject.Heart.down <- RenameIdents(scObject.Heart.down,
                     "1" = "Ventricular Cardiomyocytes",
                     "2" = "SMCs",
                     "3" = "Atrial Cardiomyocytes",
                     "4" = "ECs_Cpillary",
                     "5" = "Mural_Pericytes",
                     "6" = "ECM rich perivascular cells",
                     "7" = "Mixed Atrial/AV Canal Myocardium",
                     "8" = "Mixed ECs",
                     "9" = "Erythrocytes",
                     "10" = "Proliferative",
                     "11" = "Proliferative",
                     "12" = "Fibroblasts(Valve Mesenchyme/Precursors)",
                     "13" = "ECs_Lymphatic",
                     "14" = "Proliferative ECs_Lymphatic",
                     "15" = "Ventricular Cardiomyocytes",
                     "16" = "Mesenchyme",
                     "17" = "Endocardial-like",
                     "18" = "Cardiac Neural Crest",
                     "19" = "ECs_Lymphatic",
                     "20" = "SMCs",
                     "21" = "Endocardial-like")


scObject.Brain.down$Annotation <- Idents(scObject.Brain.down)
scObject.Heart.down$Annotation <- Idents(scObject.Heart.down)

save(scObject.Brain.down,scObject.Heart.down,file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_sketch.Rdata")

scObject.Brain.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Brain.down,split.by = "orig.ident")
scObject.Heart.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Heart.down,split.by = "orig.ident")


PCW10_Brain <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW10_Brain/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW8_Brain <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW8_Brain/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

PCW12_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW12_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW10_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW10_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW8_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW8_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW7_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW7_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

PCW10_Brain <- merge(PCW10_Brain,scObject.Brain.down$PCW10_Brain@meta.data,by="cell")
PCW8_Brain <- merge(PCW8_Brain,scObject.Brain.down$PCW8_Brain@meta.data,by="cell")

PCW7_Heart <- merge(PCW7_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW7_Heart@meta.data,by="cell")
PCW8_Heart <- merge(PCW8_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW8_Heart@meta.data,by="cell")
PCW10_Heart <- merge(PCW10_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW10_Heart@meta.data,by="cell")
PCW12_Heart <- merge(PCW12_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW12_Heart@meta.data,by="cell")

PCW10_Brain <- PCW10_Brain[,-c(7:14,17:30)]
PCW10_Heart <- PCW10_Heart[,-c(7:14,17:30)]
PCW12_Heart <- PCW12_Heart[,-c(7:14,17:30)]

write.csv(PCW10_Brain, "../Results/ISS/PCW10_Brain_ISS.coord_sub_newTEST.csv")
write.csv(PCW8_Brain,  "../Results/ISS/PCW8_Brain_ISS.coord_sub_newTEST.csv")

write.csv(PCW7_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW7_Heart_ISS.coord_sub_newTEST.csv")
write.csv(PCW8_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW8_Heart_ISS.coord_sub_newTEST.csv")
write.csv(PCW10_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW10_Heart_ISS.coord_sub_newTEST.csv")
write.csv(PCW12_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW12_Heart_ISS.coord_sub_newTEST.csv")

```


```{r scObject,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}
load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_sketch.Rdata")
scObject.Brain.down@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2] <- scObject.Brain.down@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2]*-1
scObject.Heart.down@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2] <- scObject.Heart.down@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2]*-1



celltype_cols_list <- c(
  "Proliferative" = "#00FFFF",
  "ECs_Cpillary" = "#1E90FF",
  "ECs_Arterial" = "#FF1493",
  "ECs_Venous" = "#FF8C00",
  "ECs_Lymphatic" = "#7CFC00",
  "Proliferative ECs_Lymphatic" = "#00FA9A",
  "Tip cells" = "#FFD700",
  "Mixed ECs" = "#00BFFF",
  "Endocardial-like" = "#FFFF00",

  "Neurons" = "#FF00FF",
  "Neural progenitor" = "#9400D3",
  "OPC" = "#8A2BE2",
  "Cardiac Neural Crest" = "#ADFF2F",

  "SMCs" = "#00FF00",
  "Mural_Pericytes" = "#32CD32",
  "ECM rich perivascular cells" = "#ff00ff",
  "Mesenchyme" = "#FF6347",
  "Meningeal/Mesenchyme" = "#FF7F50",
  "Fibroblasts(Valve Mesenchyme/Precursors)" = "#FFB6C1",

  "Ventricular Cardiomyocytes" = "#00CED1",
  "Atrial Cardiomyocytes" = "#ff5500",
  "Mixed Atrial/AV Canal Myocardium" = "#aa00ff",

  "Erythrocytes" = "#aa0000"
)



##python for the tissuumaps

# { "Proliferative": "#00FFFF",
#     "ECs_Cpillary": "#1E90FF",
#     "ECs_Arterial": "#FF1493",
#     "ECs_Venous": "#FF8C00",
#     "ECs_Lymphatic": "#7CFC00",
#     "Proliferative ECs_Lymphatic": "#00FA9A",
#     "Tip cells": "#FFD700",
#     "Mixed ECs": "#00BFFF",
#     "Endocardial-like": "#FFFF00",
# 
#     "Neurons": "#FF00FF",
#     "Neural progenitor": "#9400D3",
#     "OPC": "#8A2BE2",
#     "Cardiac Neural Crest": "#ADFF2F",
# 
#     "SMCs": "#00FF00",
#     "Mural_Pericytes": "#32CD32",
#     "ECM rich perivascular cells": "#ff00ff",
#     "Mesenchyme": "#FF6347",
#     "Meningeal/Mesenchyme": "#FF7F50",
#     "Fibroblasts(Valve Mesenchyme/Precursors)": "#FFB6C1",
# 
#     "Ventricular Cardiomyocytes": "#00CED1",
#     "Atrial Cardiomyocytes": "#ff5500",
#     "Mixed Atrial/AV Canal Myocardium": "#aa00ff",
# 
#     "Erythrocytes": "#aa0000"
# }


p2 <- DimPlot(scObject.Brain.down,group.by = "Annotation",label = F,cols = celltype_cols_list,reduction = "umap_harmomy")+ggtitle("Brain")+
  xlab("UMAP 1")+ylab("UMAP 2")

pdf("../Results/ISS/Ling/Plots/UMAP_Brain.pdf",width = 10,height = 8)
p2
dev.off()


scObject.Brain.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Brain.down,split.by = "orig.ident")
scObject.Heart.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Heart.down,split.by = "orig.ident")


obj <- scObject.Brain.down$PCW8_Brain
obj$Annotation <- as.character(obj$Annotation)
Idents(obj) <- "Annotation"
celltypes <- unique(obj$Annotation)
pics <- list()


for (types in celltypes) {
cells_list <- lapply(types, function(t) WhichCells(obj, expression = Annotation == t))
names(cells_list) <- types

# all_levels <- levels(Idents(obj))
# grey_cols <- setNames(rep("grey30", length(all_levels)), all_levels)
hi_cols <- unname(celltype_cols_list[as.character(types)])  # must not contain NA
cols_named <- setNames(hi_cols, types)

pics[[types]] <- DimPlot(
  obj,
  reduction = "Spatial",
  group.by = "Annotation",
  raster = FALSE,
  cols = cols_named,
  cells.highlight = cells_list,
  cols.highlight = hi_cols,
  sizes.highlight = .003,
  pt.size = 0.0005
)+
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  ggtitle(types) +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    text = element_text(color = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "white",size = 0),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "white",size = 0),
    plot.title = element_text(color = "white")
  )&NoLegend()
}


pdf("../Results/ISS/pics_pcw12_heart.pdf",width = 35,height = 30)
wrap_plots(pics,ncol = 4)
dev.off()




p1 <- DimPlot(
  scObject.Brain.down$PCW10_Brain,
  reduction = "Spatial",
  group.by = "Annotation",
  raster = FALSE,
  cols = celltype_cols_list,
  pt.size = 0.0001,alpha = .5
)+
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  ggtitle("PCW10_Brain") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    text = element_text(color = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "white",size = 0),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "white",size = 0),
    plot.title = element_text(color = "white")
  )

pdf("../Results/ISS/pics_pcw10_brain_all.pdf",width = 17,height = 15)
p1
dev.off()


```




```{r loading,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}

library(purrr); library(stringr)
load("../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2.Rdata")


scObject.Brain.down$cell <- map2_chr(colnames(scObject.Brain.down), scObject.Brain.down$orig.ident, ~ str_remove(.x, fixed(paste0("_", .y))))
scObject.Heart.down$cell <- map2_chr(colnames(scObject.Heart.down), scObject.Heart.down$orig.ident, ~ str_remove(.x, fixed(paste0("_", .y))))


scObject.Brain.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Brain.down,split.by = "orig.ident")
scObject.Heart.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Heart.down,split.by = "orig.ident")


PCW10_Brain <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW10_Brain/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW8_Brain <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW8_Brain/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

PCW12_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW12_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW10_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW10_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW8_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW8_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW7_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW7_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

PCW10_Brain <- merge(PCW10_Brain,scObject.Brain.down$PCW10_Brain@meta.data[,8:14])
PCW8_Brain <- merge(PCW8_Brain,scObject.Brain.down$PCW8_Brain@meta.data[,8:14])

PCW7_Heart <- merge(PCW7_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW7_Heart@meta.data[,8:14])
PCW8_Heart <- merge(PCW8_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW8_Heart@meta.data[,8:14])
PCW10_Heart <- merge(PCW10_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW10_Heart@meta.data[,8:14])
PCW12_Heart <- merge(PCW12_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW12_Heart@meta.data[,8:14])

write.csv(head(PCW10_Brain), "../Results/ISS/PCW10_Brain_ISS.coord_sub.csv")
write.csv(PCW8_Brain,  "../Results/ISS/PCW8_Brain_ISS.coord_sub.csv")

write.csv(PCW7_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW7_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv")
write.csv(PCW8_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW8_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv")
write.csv(PCW10_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW10_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv")
write.csv(PCW12_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW12_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv")



```


```{r iNMF,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}

#Rlinger Rcpp loader: loads the packages and links the dependencies 


gc()
proj_lib <- "/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/Theo/rlinger_build/Rlib"
h5_root  <- "/cfs/klemming/projects/supr/naiss2023-6-180/Theo/rlinger_build/opt/hdf5-1.12.2"
h5_lib   <- file.path(h5_root, "lib")

.libPaths(c(proj_lib, .libPaths()))
Sys.setenv(
  LD_LIBRARY_PATH = paste(h5_lib, Sys.getenv("LD_LIBRARY_PATH"), sep=":"),
  HDF5_DIR  = h5_root,
  HDF5_ROOT = h5_root
)
suppressWarnings({
  try(dyn.load(file.path(h5_lib, "libhdf5.so.200")),     silent = TRUE)
  try(dyn.load(file.path(h5_lib, "libhdf5_hl.so.200")),  silent = TRUE)
  try(dyn.load(file.path(h5_lib, "libhdf5_cpp.so.200")), silent = TRUE)
})

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(RcppPlanc, lib.loc = proj_lib)
  library(rliger,     lib.loc = proj_lib)
  library(Seurat)
})

library(rliger)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)
```

```{r iNMF,fig.width=30,fig.height=10}

load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.Rdata")

gc()


DefaultAssay(scObject.Brain) <- "ISS"
DefaultAssay(scObject.Heart) <- "ISS"
scObject.Brain <- DietSeurat(scObject.Brain,assays = "ISS",dimreducs = F)
scObject.Heart <- DietSeurat(scObject.Heart,assays = "ISS",dimreducs = F)

scObject.Brain <- UpdateSeuratObject(scObject.Brain)
scObject.Heart <- UpdateSeuratObject(scObject.Heart)

scObject.Brain[["ISS"]] <- split(scObject.Brain[["ISS"]], f = scObject.Brain$orig.ident)
scObject.Heart[["ISS"]] <- split(scObject.Heart[["ISS"]], f = scObject.Heart$orig.ident)


scObject.Brain <- scObject.Brain %>%
    normalize() %>%
    selectGenes() %>%
    scaleNotCenter()

scObject.Heart <- scObject.Heart %>%
    normalize() %>%
    selectGenes() %>%
    scaleNotCenter()

scObject.Brain <- scObject.Brain %>%
    runINMF(k = 11) %>%
    quantileNorm()

scObject.Heart <- scObject.Heart %>%
    runINMF(k = 20) %>%
    quantileNorm()

# scObject.Brain <- RunUMAP(scObject.Brain, reduction = "inmfNorm", dims = 1:11)
# scObject.Heart <- RunUMAP(scObject.Heart, reduction = "inmfNorm", dims = 1:20)

# DimPlot(scObject.Brain,group.by = "orig.ident")
# DimPlot(scObject.Heart,group.by = "orig.ident")




load("../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2.Rdata")

# cell names (columns) are the keys
common <- intersect(Cells(scObject.Heart), Cells(scObject.Heart.down))
scObject.Heart <- subset(scObject.Heart, cells = common)

common <- intersect(Cells(scObject.Brain), Cells(scObject.Brain.down))

scObject.Brain <- subset(scObject.Brain, cells = common)



scObject.Brain$inmfNorm.cluster <- scObject.Brain %>%
    FindNeighbors(reduction = "inmfNorm", dims = 1:11) %>%
    FindClusters(resolution = c(0.5,1))

scObject.Heart <- scObject.Heart %>%
    FindNeighbors(reduction = "inmfNorm", dims = 1:20) %>%
    FindClusters(resolution = c(0.5,1))


scObject.Heart.down$inmfNorm.cluster <- scObject.Heart$inmfNorm.cluster
scObject.Brain.down$inmfNorm.cluster <- scObject.Brain$inmfNorm.cluster





######################## Label transfering

load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain_LABEL.transfered.Rdata")

# cell names (columns) are the keys
common <- intersect(Cells(scObject.Heart), Cells(scObject.Heart.down))
scObject.Heart <- subset(scObject.Heart, cells = common)

common <- intersect(Cells(scObject.Brain), Cells(scObject.Brain.down))

scObject.Brain <- subset(scObject.Brain, cells = common)

scObject.Heart.down$predicted.id <- scObject.Heart$predicted.id
scObject.Brain.down$predicted.id <- scObject.Brain$predicted.id




scObject.Brain.down$cell <- map2_chr(colnames(scObject.Brain.down), scObject.Brain.down$orig.ident, ~ str_remove(.x, fixed(paste0("_", .y))))
scObject.Heart.down$cell <- map2_chr(colnames(scObject.Heart.down), scObject.Heart.down$orig.ident, ~ str_remove(.x, fixed(paste0("_", .y))))

scObject.Brain.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Brain.down,split.by = "orig.ident")
scObject.Heart.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Heart.down,split.by = "orig.ident")


PCW10_Brain <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW10_Brain/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW8_Brain <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW8_Brain/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

PCW12_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW12_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW10_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW10_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW8_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW8_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW7_Heart <- read.csv("../Data/ISS/PCW7_Heart/GeneCoord.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)



PCW10_Brain <- merge(PCW10_Brain,scObject.Brain.down$PCW10_Brain@meta.data[,8:19], by = "cell", all.x = FALSE)
PCW8_Brain <- merge(PCW8_Brain,scObject.Brain.down$PCW8_Brain@meta.data[,8:19], by = "cell", all.x = FALSE)


PCW7_Heart <- merge(PCW7_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW7_Heart@meta.data[,8:19], by = "cell", all.x = FALSE)
PCW8_Heart <- merge(PCW8_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW8_Heart@meta.data[,8:19], by = "cell", all.x = FALSE)
PCW10_Heart <- merge(PCW10_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW10_Heart@meta.data[,8:19], by = "cell", all.x = FALSE)
PCW12_Heart <- merge(PCW12_Heart,scObject.Heart.down$PCW12_Heart@meta.data[,8:19], by = "cell", all.x = FALSE)



write.csv(PCW10_Brain, "../Results/ISS/PCW10_Brain_ISS.coord_sub.csv")
write.csv(PCW8_Brain,  "../Results/ISS/PCW8_Brain_ISS.coord_sub.csv")

write.csv(PCW7_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW7_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv")
write.csv(PCW8_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW8_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv")
write.csv(PCW10_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW10_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv")
write.csv(PCW12_Heart,  "../Results/ISS/PCW12_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv")



save(scObject.Brain.down,scObject.Heart.down,file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_split.Rdata")

scObject.Brain.down <- Reduce(merge,scObject.Brain.down)
scObject.Heart.down <- Reduce(merge,scObject.Heart.down)

Idents(scObject.Brain.down) <- "SCT_snn_res.2.5"
Idents(scObject.Heart.down) <- "SCT_snn_res.2.5"

scObject.Brain.down <- PrepSCTFindMarkers(scObject.Brain.down)
scObject.Heart.down <- PrepSCTFindMarkers(scObject.Heart.down)

brain.dowm.deg <- FindAllMarkers(scObject.Brain.down,features = intersect(unique(PCW10_Brain$feature_name),rownames(scObject.Brain.down@assays$SCT)),logfc.threshold = 0,only.pos = T,group.by = "SCT_snn_res.2.5")
heart.dowm.deg <- FindAllMarkers(scObject.Heart.down,features = intersect(unique(PCW10_Brain$feature_name),rownames(scObject.Brain.down@assays$SCT)),logfc.threshold = 0,only.pos = T,group.by = "SCT_snn_res.2.5")


brain.dowm.deg$cluster <- factor(brain.dowm.deg$cluster,levels =  sort(as.numeric(as.character(unique(brain.dowm.deg$cluster)))))
heart.dowm.deg$cluster <- factor(heart.dowm.deg$cluster,levels =  sort(as.numeric(as.character(unique(heart.dowm.deg$cluster)))))

brain.dowm.deg <- brain.dowm.deg[order(brain.dowm.deg$cluster),]
heart.dowm.deg <- heart.dowm.deg[order(heart.dowm.deg$cluster),]

brain.dowm.deg.tops <- c()
for (clusters in unique(brain.dowm.deg$cluster)) {
  x <- subset(brain.dowm.deg, cluster == clusters & p_val_adj<0.05)
  x <- x[order(-x$avg_log2FC, -x$p_val_adj),][1:10,]
  brain.dowm.deg.tops <- rbind(brain.dowm.deg.tops,x)
}

heart.dowm.deg.tops <- c()
for (clusters in unique(heart.dowm.deg$cluster)) {
  x <- subset(heart.dowm.deg, cluster == clusters & p_val_adj<0.05)
  x <- x[order(-x$avg_log2FC, -x$p_val_adj),][1:10,]
  heart.dowm.deg.tops <- rbind(heart.dowm.deg.tops,x)
}

scObject.Brain.down$SCT_snn_res.2.5 <- factor(scObject.Brain.down$SCT_snn_res.2.5,levels =  sort(as.numeric(as.character(unique(scObject.Brain.down$SCT_snn_res.2.5)))))
scObject.Heart.down$SCT_snn_res.2.5 <- factor(scObject.Heart.down$SCT_snn_res.2.5,levels =  sort(as.numeric(as.character(unique(scObject.Heart.down$SCT_snn_res.2.5)))))


pdf("../Results/ISS/VLN.Down.Brain.pdf",width = 40,height = 15)
DotPlot(scObject.Brain.down,features = unique(brain.dowm.deg.tops$gene),group.by = "SCT_snn_res.2.5")+scale_color_gradient2(low = "grey60",mid = "white",high = "purple3")+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20),title = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20))+rotate_x_text(90)+ggtitle("Brain.Downsampled.300K")
dev.off()

pdf("../Results/ISS/VLN.Down.Heart.pdf",width = 40,height = 15)
DotPlot(scObject.Heart.down,features = unique(heart.dowm.deg.tops$gene),group.by = "SCT_snn_res.2.5")+scale_color_gradient2(low = "grey60",mid = "white",high = "purple3")+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20),title = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20))+rotate_x_text(90)+ggtitle("Heart.Downsampled.300K")
dev.off()

```


```{r iNMF,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}

load("../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2.Rdata")

p1 <- DimPlot(scObject.Brain.down,group.by = "SCT_snn_res.2.5",label = T)+ggtitle("Brain_SCT_snn_res.2.5")+
 guides(x = axis, y = axis) +xlab("UMAP 1")+ylab("UMAP 2")+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(arrow = arrow(angle = 20, length = unit(4, "points"))),
        axis.title = element_text(hjust = 0,size = 10),axis.text.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks = element_blank())

p2 <- DimPlot(scObject.Heart.down,group.by = "SCT_snn_res.2.5",label = T)+ggtitle("Heart_SCT_snn_res.2.5")+
 guides(x = axis, y = axis) +xlab("UMAP 1")+ylab("UMAP 2")+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(arrow = arrow(angle = 20, length = unit(4, "points"))),
        axis.title = element_text(hjust = 0,size = 10),axis.text.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks = element_blank())


pdf("../Results/ISS/UMAP.pdf",width = 15,height = 30)
p1/p2
dev.off()


PCW10_Brain <- read.csv( "../Results/ISS/PCW10_Brain_ISS.coord_sub.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW8_Brain <- read.csv( "../Results/ISS/PCW8_Brain_ISS.coord_sub.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

PCW10_Brain$Sample <- "PCW10_Brain"
PCW8_Brain$Sample <- "PCW8_Brain"


Brain <- rbind(PCW10_Brain,PCW8_Brain)
Brain$cell <- paste(Brain$cell,Brain$Sample,sep = "_")
scObject.Brain.down@meta.data[,8:15] <- merge(scObject.Brain.down@meta.data[,8:15], PCW10_Brain[8:15],)




PCW7_Heart <- read.csv( "../Results/ISS/PCW7_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW8_Heart <- read.csv( "../Results/ISS/PCW8_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW10_Heart <- read.csv( "../Results/ISS/PCW10_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW12_Heart <- read.csv(  "../Results/ISS/PCW12_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)


```






# I want to add the annotations that Ling has produced

```{r iNMF,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}


load("../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2.Rdata")

scObject.Brain.down$cell <- map2_chr(colnames(scObject.Brain.down), scObject.Brain.down$orig.ident, ~ str_remove(.x, fixed(paste0("_", .y))))
scObject.Heart.down$cell <- map2_chr(colnames(scObject.Heart.down), scObject.Heart.down$orig.ident, ~ str_remove(.x, fixed(paste0("_", .y))))

scObject.Brain.down.spl <- SplitObject(scObject.Brain.down,split.by = "orig.ident")
scObject.Heart.down.spl <- SplitObject(scObject.Heart.down,split.by = "orig.ident")


PCW10_Brain <- read.csv("../Results/ISS/Ling/PCW10_Brain.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW8_Brain <- read.csv("../Results/ISS/Ling/PCW8_Brain.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

PCW12_Heart <- read.csv("../Results/ISS/Ling/PCW12_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW10_Heart <- read.csv("../Results/ISS/Ling/PCW10_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW8_Heart <- read.csv("../Results/ISS/Ling/PCW8_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
PCW7_Heart <- read.csv("../Results/ISS/Ling/PCW7_Heart_ISS.coord_sub.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)



PCW7_Heart$centroid_X <- PCW7_Heart$x_location
PCW7_Heart$centroid_Y <- PCW7_Heart$y_location

PCW8_Heart$centroid_X <- PCW8_Heart$x_location
PCW8_Heart$centroid_Y <- PCW8_Heart$y_location

PCW10_Heart$centroid_X <- PCW10_Heart$x_location
PCW10_Heart$centroid_Y <- PCW10_Heart$y_location

PCW12_Heart$centroid_X <- PCW12_Heart$x_location
PCW12_Heart$centroid_Y <- PCW12_Heart$y_location


scObject.Brain.down.spl$PCW10_Brain <- AddMetaData(scObject.Brain.down.spl$PCW10_Brain,PCW10_Brain[match(scObject.Brain.down.spl$PCW10_Brain$cell,PCW10_Brain$cell),c(20:22)])

scObject.Brain.down.spl$PCW8_Brain <- AddMetaData(scObject.Brain.down.spl$PCW8_Brain,PCW8_Brain[match(scObject.Brain.down.spl$PCW8_Brain$cell,PCW8_Brain$cell),c(20:22)])


scObject.Heart.down.spl$PCW7_Heart <- AddMetaData(scObject.Heart.down.spl$PCW7_Heart,PCW7_Heart[match(scObject.Heart.down.spl$PCW7_Heart$cell,PCW7_Heart$cell),c(20:22)])
scObject.Heart.down.spl$PCW8_Heart <- AddMetaData(scObject.Heart.down.spl$PCW8_Heart,PCW8_Heart[match(scObject.Heart.down.spl$PCW8_Heart$cell,PCW8_Heart$cell),c(20:22)])
scObject.Heart.down.spl$PCW10_Heart <- AddMetaData(scObject.Heart.down.spl$PCW10_Heart,PCW10_Heart[match(scObject.Heart.down.spl$PCW10_Heart$cell,PCW10_Heart$cell),c(20:22)])
scObject.Heart.down.spl$PCW12_Heart <- AddMetaData(scObject.Heart.down.spl$PCW12_Heart,PCW12_Heart[match(scObject.Heart.down.spl$PCW12_Heart$cell,PCW12_Heart$cell),c(20:22)])



scObject.Brain.down.spl <- Reduce(merge,scObject.Brain.down.spl)
scObject.Heart.down.spl <- Reduce(merge,scObject.Heart.down.spl)
scObject.Brain.down <- AddMetaData(scObject.Brain.down,scObject.Brain.down.spl@meta.data[,c(18:20)]) 
scObject.Heart.down <- AddMetaData(scObject.Heart.down,scObject.Heart.down.spl@meta.data[,c(18:20)]) 

scObject.Brain.down <- SetIdent(scObject.Brain.down,value = "annotation")

scObject.Brain.down <- RenameIdents(scObject.Brain.down,
                     "Neuron_1" = "Cortex neuron",
                     "Neuron_2" = "Intermediate zone neuron",
                     "Neuron_3" = "Subventricular zone neuron",
                     "Neuron_4" = "Cortex neuron",
                     "Neuron_5" = "Cortex neuron",
                     "Neuron_6" = "Thalamus neuron",
                     "Neuron_7" = "Ventricular zone neuron")

scObject.Brain.down$annotation2 <- Idents(scObject.Brain.down)



## Making a new embedding for this plot with the spatial information

scObject.Brain.down$Age.PCW <- factor(scObject.Brain.down$Age.PCW,levels = c("PCW8","PCW10"))
scObject.Heart.down$Age.PCW <- factor(scObject.Heart.down$Age.PCW,levels = c("PCW7",   "PCW8" ,"PCW10", "PCW12"))


coords <- scObject.Brain.down@meta.data[, c("centroid_X", "centroid_Y")]
coords <- as.matrix(coords)
colnames(coords) <- c("Spatial_1", "Spatial_2")


scObject.Brain.down[["Spatial"]] <- CreateDimReducObject(
  embeddings = coords,
  key = "Spatial_",
  assay = DefaultAssay(scObject.Brain.down)
)


coords <- scObject.Heart.down@meta.data[, c("centroid_X", "centroid_Y")]
coords <- as.matrix(coords)
colnames(coords) <- c("Spatial_1", "Spatial_2")

scObject.Heart.down[["Spatial"]] <- CreateDimReducObject(
  embeddings = coords,
  key = "Spatial_",
  assay = DefaultAssay(scObject.Heart.down)
)

scObject.Brain.down@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2] <- scObject.Brain.down@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2]*-1
scObject.Heart.down@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2] <- scObject.Heart.down@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2]*-1


# save(scObject.Brain.down,scObject.Heart.down,file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2.Rdata")


library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# make sure age order is correct
scObject.Heart.down$Age.PCW <- factor(
  scObject.Heart.down$Age.PCW,
  levels = c("PCW7","PCW8","PCW10","PCW12")
)


# average expression (SCT)
avg_mat <- AverageExpression(
  scObject.Heart.down,
  group.by = c("annotation","Age.PCW"),
  features = c("MKI67","TOP2A"),
  assays = "SCT",
  slot = "data"
)$SCT

# reshape: genes x groups -> long df with Annotation + Age
df <- as.data.frame(avg_mat) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("gene") |>
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "group", values_to = "avg_expr") |>
  separate(group, into = c("annotation","Age.PCW"), sep = "_(?=PCW)", extra = "merge") |>
  mutate(Age.PCW = factor(Age.PCW, levels = levels(scObject.Heart.down$Age.PCW)))

df$annotation <- gsub("-", "_", df$annotation)

# --- Plot 1: MKI67
p_mki67 <- df |>
  filter(gene == "MKI67") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Age.PCW, y = avg_expr, group = annotation, color = annotation)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  labs(x = "Age (PCW)", y = "Average expression (SCT)", title = "MKI67") +
  theme_classic()

# --- Plot 2: TOP2A
p_top2a <- df |>
  filter(gene == "TOP2A") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Age.PCW, y = avg_expr, group = annotation, color = annotation)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  labs(x = "Age (PCW)", y = "Average expression (SCT)", title = "TOP2A") +
  theme_classic()+NoLegend()

pdf("../Results/ISS/Fig2Plots/ISS_Heart_Temporal.Prolifration.pdf",width = 8,height = 6)
p_top2a+p_mki67
dev.off()

####################################################################
####################################################################

load("../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2.Rdata")


cols <- c(
  "ECs_Arterial" = "#FF1493",
  "ECs_Venous" = "#FF8C00",
  "ECs_Capillary" = "#1E90FF",
  "ECs_Lymph" = "green4",
  "Cortex neuron" = "#213B9C",
  # "Neuron_2" = "#3150B3",
  "Intermediate zone neuron" = "#4166CA",
  # "Neuron_4" = "#517BE1",
  "Subventricular zone neuron" = "#6D89E8",
  "Thalamus neuron" = "#8B97EF",
  "Ventricular zone neuron" = "#A9A5F6",
  "NSCs" = "#9A62DD",
  "OPCs" = "#8A2BE2",
  "Proliferative" = "#00FFFF",
  "Immune" = "#A2AF3E",
  "Erythroid lineage cells" = "#E84C9D",
  "FBs" = "#D69D5F",
  "FBs_Cardiac" = "#A87147",
  "FBs_PAAFs" = "purple4",
  "Pericytes" = "#32CD52",
  "SMCs" = "green",
  "CMs_Ventricularmuscle" = "#D84C2F",
  "CMs_Papillarymuscle" = "#F06F3D",
  "ECM" = "#D4B174",
  "EMT"="yellow"
)

p2 <- DimPlot(scObject.Heart.down,group.by = "annotation",label = F,cols = cols,reduction = "umap_harmomy")+ggtitle("Heart")+
  xlab("UMAP 1")+ylab("UMAP 2")

pdf("../Results/ISS/Ling/Plots/UMAP_heart.pdf",width = 10,height = 8)
p2
dev.off()


scObject.Brain.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Brain.down,split.by = "orig.ident")
scObject.Heart.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Heart.down,split.by = "orig.ident")


obj <- scObject.Heart.down$PCW7_Heart
obj$annotation <- as.character(obj$annotation)
Idents(obj) <- "annotation"
celltypes <- unique(obj$annotation)
pics <- list()


for (types in celltypes) {
cells_list <- lapply(types, function(t) WhichCells(obj, expression = annotation == t))
names(cells_list) <- types

# all_levels <- levels(Idents(obj))
# grey_cols <- setNames(rep("grey30", length(all_levels)), all_levels)
hi_cols <- unname(cols[as.character(types)])  # must not contain NA
cols_named <- setNames(hi_cols, types)

pics[[types]] <- DimPlot(
  obj,
  reduction = "Spatial",
  group.by = "annotation",
  raster = FALSE,
  cols = cols_named,
  cells.highlight = cells_list,
  cols.highlight = hi_cols,
  sizes.highlight = .003,
  pt.size = 0.0005
)+
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  ggtitle(types) +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    text = element_text(color = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "white",size = 0),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "white",size = 0),
    plot.title = element_text(color = "white")
  )&NoLegend()
}


pdf("../Results/ISS/Ling/Plots/pics_pcw7_heart_Ling.pdf",width = 15,height = 15)
wrap_plots(pics,ncol = 4)
dev.off()


p1 <- DimPlot(
  obj,
  reduction = "Spatial",
  group.by = "annotation",
  raster = FALSE,
  cols = cols,
  pt.size = 0.0001,alpha = .8
)+
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  ggtitle("PCW7_Heart") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    text = element_text(color = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "white",size = 0),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "white",size = 0),
    plot.title = element_text(color = "white")
  )

pdf("../Results/ISS/Ling/Plots/pics_pcw7_heart_Ling_all.pdf",width = 8,height = 6)
p1
dev.off()




```



```{r iNMF,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}

library(ggplot2)

# Get UMAP ranges from the Seurat object
emb <- Embeddings(scObject.Brain.down, "umap_harmomy")
xr  <- range(emb[, 1])
yr  <- range(emb[, 2])

# how long you want the axes (as fraction of range)
frac <- 0.12

p1 <- DimPlot(scObject.Brain.down,label = F,repel = F,raster = FALSE,group.by = "annotation2",cols = cols) +
    NoLegend() +
    ggtitle("Brain") +
    xlab("UMAP 1") +
    ylab("UMAP 2") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
        axis.title = element_text(hjust = 0,size = 10),axis.text.x  = element_blank(),axis.text.y  = element_blank(),axis.ticks   = element_blank(),axis.line = element_blank()  # IMPORTANT: remove default full-length axes
    ) +
    # short x-axis arrow
    geom_segment(inherit.aes = FALSE,x = xr[1],xend = xr[1] + diff(xr) * frac,y = yr[1],yend = yr[1],arrow = arrow(angle = 20, length = unit(4, "points")),linewidth = 0.5
    ) +
    # short y-axis arrow
    geom_segment(inherit.aes = FALSE,x = xr[1],xend = xr[1],y = yr[1],yend = yr[1] + diff(yr) * frac,arrow = arrow(angle = 20, length = unit(4, "points")),linewidth = 0.5)


p2 <- DimPlot(scObject.Heart.down,label = F,repel = F,raster = FALSE,group.by = "annotation",cols = cols) +
    NoLegend() +
    ggtitle("Heart") +
    xlab("UMAP 1") +
    ylab("UMAP 2") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
        axis.title = element_text(hjust = 0,size = 0),axis.text.x  = element_blank(),axis.text.y  = element_blank(),axis.ticks   = element_blank(),axis.line = element_blank()  # IMPORTANT: remove default full-length axes
    ) +
    # short x-axis arrow
    geom_segment(inherit.aes = FALSE,x = xr[1],xend = xr[1] + diff(xr) * frac,y = yr[1],yend = yr[1],arrow = arrow(angle = 20, length = unit(0, "points")),linewidth = 0
    ) +
    # short y-axis arrow
    geom_segment(inherit.aes = FALSE,x = xr[1],xend = xr[1],y = yr[1],yend = yr[1] + diff(yr) * frac,arrow = arrow(angle = 20, length = unit(0, "points")),linewidth = 0)


pdf("../Results/Manuscript/Figure1/ISS.UMAP.pdf",width = 15,height = 5.5)
p1+p2
dev.off()




p1 <- DimPlot(subset(scObject.Brain.down, cells = colnames(scObject.Brain.down@assays$sketch@counts)), reduction = "Spatial",
         group.by = "orig.ident", label = F,split.by = "Age.PCW",ncol = 2,pt.size = .01,raster = F)+xlab("centroid_X")+ylab("centroid_Y")+ggtitle("Brain")



p2 <- DimPlot(subset(scObject.Heart.down, cells = colnames(scObject.Heart.down@assays$sketch@counts)), reduction = "Spatial",
         group.by = "orig.ident", label = F,split.by = "Age.PCW",ncol = 2,pt.size = .01,raster = F)+xlab("centroid_X")+ylab("centroid_Y")+ggtitle("Heart")


pdf("../Results/Manuscript/Figure1/ISS.Spatial.Brain.rasterT.pdf",width = 12,height = 5)
p1
dev.off()

pdf("../Results/Manuscript/Figure1/ISS.Spatial.Heart.rasterT.pdf",width = 12,height = 9)
p2
dev.off()


scObject.Brain.down$annotation2 <- factor(scObject.Brain.down$annotation2,levels = sort(unique(scObject.Brain.down$annotation2)))
scObject.Heart.down$annotation <- factor(scObject.Heart.down$annotation,levels = sort(unique(scObject.Heart.down$annotation)))

scObject.Brain.down <- PrepSCTFindMarkers(scObject.Brain.down)
scObject.Heart.down <- PrepSCTFindMarkers(scObject.Heart.down)


DEG.brain <- FindAllMarkers(scObject.Brain.down,only.pos = T,test.use = "MAST",logfc.threshold = 0.4,latent.vars = "Age.PCW",group.by = "annotation2")
# DEG.Heart <- FindAllMarkers(scObject.Heart.down,only.pos = T,test.use = "MAST",logfc.threshold = 0.4,latent.vars = "Age.PCW",group.by = "annotation")

save(DEG.brain,DEG.Heart,file="../Rsave/ISS.degs.Rdata")
load(file="../Rsave/ISS.degs.Rdata")


tops.rna.brain <- c()
for (clusters in unique(DEG.brain$cluster)) {
  x <- subset(DEG.brain, cluster == clusters & p_val_adj<0.05)
  x <- x[order(-x$avg_log2FC, -x$p_val_adj),][1:3,]
  tops.rna.brain <- rbind(tops.rna.brain,x)
}

tops.rna.heart <- c()
for (clusters in unique(DEG.Heart$cluster)) {
  x <- subset(DEG.Heart, cluster == clusters & p_val_adj<0.05)
  x <- x[order(-x$avg_log2FC, -x$p_val_adj),][1:3,]
  tops.rna.heart <- rbind(tops.rna.heart,x)
}


p1 <- DotPlot(scObject.Brain.down,features = unique(tops.rna.brain$gene),group.by = "annotation2")+scale_color_gradient2(low = "grey60",mid = "white",high = "purple3")+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20),title = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20))+rotate_x_text(90)+ggtitle("Brain")

p2 <- DotPlot(scObject.Heart.down,features = unique(tops.rna.heart$gene),group.by = "annotation")+scale_color_gradient2(low = "grey60",mid = "white",high = "purple3")+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20),title = element_text(face = "bold",size = 20))+rotate_x_text(90)+ggtitle("Heart")


pdf("../Results/Manuscript/Figure1/ISS.dotplot.pdf",width = 25,height = 15)

p1/p2
dev.off()


```


# MKI67 expression


```{r iNMF,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}
load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_sketch.Rdata")
RNA.all.int <- readRDS(file="./RNA.int.Rds")

RNA.all.int <- subset(RNA.all.int, Age.PCW !="PCW22")
RNA.all.int <- SplitObject(RNA.all.int,split.by = "Organ")
fill_map <- readRDS("../Rsave/fill_map.Rds")


RNA.all.int$Brain$Age.PCW <- factor(
  RNA.all.int$Brain$Age.PCW ,
  levels = c("PCW04", "PCW05", "PCW06", "PCW07", "PCW08", "PCW09", "PCW10", "PCW12", "PCW13")
)

RNA.all.int$Heart$Age.PCW <- factor(
  RNA.all.int$Heart$Age.PCW ,
  levels = c("PCW04", "PCW05", "PCW06", "PCW07", "PCW08", "PCW10", "PCW12" )
)

RNA.all.int$Brain$Annotation <- RNA.all.int$Brain$newL3_Cell_type
RNA.all.int$Heart$Annotation <- RNA.all.int$Heart$newL3_Cell_type

# make sure age order is correct
scObject.Brain.down$Age.PCW <- factor(
  scObject.Brain.down$Age.PCW,
  levels = c("PCW8","PCW10")
)

obj <- RNA.all.int$Heart
# average expression (SCT)
avg_mat <- AverageExpression(
  obj,
  group.by = c("Annotation","Age.PCW"),
  features = c("MKI67","TOP2A"),
  assays = "RNA",
  slot = "data"
)$RNA

# reshape: genes x groups -> long df with Annotation + Age
df <- as.data.frame(avg_mat) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("gene") |>
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "group", values_to = "avg_expr") |>
  separate(group, into = c("Annotation","Age.PCW"), sep = "_(?=PCW)", extra = "merge") |>
  mutate(Age.PCW = factor(Age.PCW, levels = levels(obj$Age.PCW)))

df$Annotation <- gsub("-", "_", df$Annotation)
# df$Annotation <- gsub("Endocardial_like","Endocardial-like",df$Annotation)
# --- Plot 1: MKI67
p_mki67 <- df |>
  filter(gene == "MKI67") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Age.PCW, y = avg_expr, group = Annotation, color = Annotation)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = fill_map) +
  labs(x = "Age (PCW)", y = "Average expression (SCT)", title = "MKI67") +
  theme_classic()

# --- Plot 2: TOP2A
p_top2a <- df |>
  filter(gene == "TOP2A") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Age.PCW, y = avg_expr, group = Annotation, color = Annotation)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = fill_map) +
  labs(x = "Age (PCW)", y = "Average expression (SCT)", title = "TOP2A") +
  theme_classic()+NoLegend()

pdf("../Results/ISS/Fig2Plots/RNA_Heart_Temporal.Prolifration.pdf",width = 15,height = 6)
p_top2a+p_mki67
dev.off()


```


```{r iNMF,fig.width=20,fig.height=10}

load(file = "../Rsave/scObject.Heart_Brain.down.alg.2_sketch.Rdata")
scObject.Brain.down@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2] <- scObject.Brain.down@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2]*-1
scObject.Heart.down@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2] <- scObject.Heart.down@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2]*-1

scObject.Brain.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Brain.down,split.by = "orig.ident")
scObject.Heart.down <- SplitObject(scObject.Heart.down,split.by = "orig.ident")

DefaultAssay(scObject.Brain.down) <- "SCT"
DefaultAssay(scObject.Heart.down) <- "SCT"


obj <- scObject.Brain.down$PCW8_Brain

p1 <- DimPlot(
  obj,
  reduction = "Spatial",
  group.by = "Annotation",
  raster = FALSE,
  cols = celltype_cols_list,
  pt.size = 0.0001,
  alpha = .8
) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(x_min, x_max),
    breaks = seq(floor(x_min/400)*400, ceiling(x_max/400)*400, by = 400)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(y_min, y_max),
    breaks = seq(floor(y_min/400)*400, ceiling(y_max/400)*400, by = 400)
  ) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  ggtitle("PCW12_Heart") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),

    # 👇 add grids
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey40", size = 0.8),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey20", size = 0.6),

    text = element_text(color = "white"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "white", size = 8),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "white"),
    plot.title = element_text(color = "white")
  ) & NoLegend() + rotate_x_text(70)

library(dplyr)

x <- obj@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,1]
y <- obj@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2]

obj$ROI <- case_when(
  x > 23300 & x < 24900 & y > -8400  & y < -6400  ~ "ROI_1",
  x > 25200 & x < 26800 & y > -12400 & y < -10400 ~ "ROI_2",
  TRUE ~ "other"
)



x_min <- min(obj@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,1])
x_max <- max(obj@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,1])
y_min <- min(obj@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2])
y_max <- max(obj@reductions$Spatial@cell.embeddings[,2])

p2 <- DimPlot(
    obj,
    reduction = "Spatial",
    group.by = "ROI",
    raster = FALSE,
    pt.size = 0.0001,
    alpha = .8
) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        limits = c(x_min, x_max),
        breaks = seq(floor(x_min/1000)*1000, ceiling(x_max/1000)*1000, by = 1000)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
        limits = c(y_min, y_max),
        breaks = seq(floor(y_min/1000)*1000, ceiling(y_max/1000)*1000, by = 1000)
    ) +
    xlab("") +
    ylab("") +
    ggtitle("Brain_PCW8") +
    theme(
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "black", colour = NA),
        text = element_text(color = "white"),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "white",size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "white"),
        plot.title = element_text(color = "white")
    ) +rotate_x_text(70)

obj_ROI <- obj
obj_ROI <- subset(obj_ROI,Annotation=="ECs_Venous" & ROI != "other")

p3 <- VlnPlot(obj_ROI,features = "MKI67",group.by = "ROI",pt.size = 0)+ggtitle("vECs_MKI67")
```
